deployment_rule: pushes to main deploy via Cloudflare Pages

brand_guidelines.tone: Practical golf cart marketplace specialists who make buying, selling, and comparing carts feel simple, transparent, and trustworthy.
brand_guidelines.lead_generation_context: This micro-site exists to generate qualified leads for Jeff Martin Auctioneers. Content should make Jeff Martin Auctioneers the trusted marketplace and contact brand behind the site, especially in CTAs and conversion language.
audience: Golf cart buyers comparing personal, utility, and fleet carts
Dealers looking to move multiple carts through a marketplace
Property owners and communities sourcing utility or street-legal carts
Businesses evaluating fleet and maintenance cart options
Sellers listing used golf carts online
avoid: thin comparison content without useful buying guidance
unverified claims about cart pricing, battery life, or availability
using the microsite name as the speaking brand in CTAs when Jeff Martin Auctioneers should be named instead

preferred_destinations: buyer registration and lead capture sections
brand and category landing pages that support registration

notes: This repo is the live www.jmagolfcarts.com site.
The site now exposes a v1 blog system with /blog and /blog/{category}/{slug} routes.
Content path, content format, and image path now match the implemented site structure.
Automation can create one TypeScript content module or extend the posts data file for initial publishing workflows.
